message.content:
Create the following 5 page components in C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\. Each page must use CSS variables (var(--bg-base), var(--text-primary), var(--accent), etc.) and import from the project's existing UI components and demo data.

IMPORTANT CONTEXT:
- Project location: C:\Users\User\stan-io
- UI components available: Button (from ../components/ui/Button), Card (from ../components/ui/Card), Badge (from ../components/ui/Badge), StatsCard (from ../components/ui/StatsCard), DataTable (from ../components/ui/DataTable), Tabs (from ../components/ui/Tabs), EmptyState (from ../components/ui/EmptyState), Modal (from ../components/ui/Modal), Toggle (from ../components/ui/Toggle)
- Demo data available from ../lib/demo-data: demoUser, demoProducts, demoCourse, demoBookingConfig, demoBookings, demoMembership, demoOrders, demoSubscribers, demoEmailFlows, demoEmailBroadcasts, demoAffiliates, demoDiscountCodes, demoAnalytics, demoIntegrations
- Types from ../types: Product, ProductType, Course, CourseModule, CourseLesson, Order, AnalyticsData, etc.
- Use Tailwind CSS classes with CSS custom properties (e.g. text-[var(--text-primary)], bg-[var(--bg-surface)])
- Icons from lucide-react
- Every component is a default export: `export default function PageName() { ... }`

Create these files (write actual rich, functional code, not stubs):

## 1. pages/Dashboard.tsx
A rich dashboard with:
- Page title "Dashboard" + subtitle "Welcome back, Sarah"
- 4 StatsCards in a row: Total Revenue ($43,512, +12.5% vs last month), Sales (820, +8.3%), Active Products (5), Subscribers (1,580)
- Revenue chart placeholder using a simple visual (recharts AreaChart with the dailyData from demoAnalytics). Import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'
- Recent Orders table showing last 5 orders from demoOrders with columns: Order, Customer, Product, Amount, Status, Date
- Status badges: completed = success variant, refunded = error, pending = warning
- Top Products list showing demoAnalytics.topProducts in cards
- Quick actions section with buttons: "Add Product", "Send Broadcast", "View Store"

## 2. pages/AllProducts.tsx
- Page title "Products" with "Add Product" button (primary) on the right
- Tab bar for filtering: All, Digital, Course, Booking, Membership, Webinar
- Product grid (3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile) showing demoProducts
- Each product card shows: image placeholder (colored div with icon based on type), title, type badge, price, sales count, revenue, published toggle
- Search input at the top
- Sort dropdown (Newest, Best selling, Price high/low)

## 3. pages/DigitalProducts.tsx
- Page title "Digital Products"
- Filtered list of demoProducts where type === 'digital'
- Each product shows: title, description excerpt, price, comparePrice (strikethrough), downloads list, sales count, revenue
- "Create Digital Product" button
- If no products, show EmptyState

## 4. pages/Courses.tsx
- Page title "Courses"  
- Shows demoCourse data in a course builder-style view
- Course header: title, description, published badge, student count (from the product's salesCount), revenue
- Module list: each module is a Card with title, lesson count, expand/collapse
- Each lesson shows: icon (video/text/download), title, type badge, duration if video
- "Add Module" and "Add Lesson" buttons
- Course settings panel at the top: header image area, price, CTA text

## 5. pages/MyStore.tsx
- Page title "My Store" + "Open Store" external link button
- Preview of the public storefront in a phone-like frame (centered, max-w-sm, with rounded corners and shadow)
- Inside the frame: creator avatar, name, bio, social links row (icons), product listing
- Store theme selector: 4 template options (minimal, classic, magazine, bold) shown as small preview cards
- Color picker for primary color (just a few preset swatches)
- Font selector (Inter, Plus Jakarta Sans, DM Sans, Playfair Display)
- "Save Changes" button

Create the pages/ directory first, then write each file.

content.text: I'll start by reading the project structure and existing components to understand the codebase patterns.

content.content:
components
globals.css
index.html
index.tsx

Modal.tsx
StatsCard.tsx
Tabs.tsx
ThemeToggle.tsx
Toggle.tsx
Exit code 2
<tool_use_error>Sibling tool call errored</tool_use_error>

demo-data.ts
theme-context.tsx

input.description: Filter TS errors for only the 5 new files

content.text:
No TypeScript errors in any of my 5 new pages. Here is a summary of what was created:

---

## Created Files

### 1. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Dashboard.tsx`
- Page title "Dashboard" with "Welcome back, Sarah" subtitle
- 4 StatsCards: Total Revenue ($43,512, +12.5%), Sales (820, +8.3%), Active Products (5), Subscribers (1,580)
- Revenue area chart using recharts `AreaChart` with `demoAnalytics.dailyData`, gradient fill, custom tooltip styled with CSS variables
- Recent Orders `DataTable` showing last 5 `demoOrders` with columns: Order, Customer, Product, Amount, Status (with colored Badge variants: completed=success, refunded=error, pending=warning), Date
- Top Products sidebar showing `demoAnalytics.topProducts` in ranked cards with index number, name, sales count, and revenue
- Quick Actions section with "Add Product", "Send Broadcast", "View Store" buttons

### 2. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\AllProducts.tsx`
- Page title "Products" with "Add Product" primary button on the right
- Tab bar using `Tabs` component for filtering: All, Digital, Course, Booking, Membership, Webinar
- Search input with search icon
- Sort dropdown (Newest, Best Selling, Price High/Low) with popup menu
- 3-column responsive product grid (1 col mobile, 2 col md, 3 col lg) of `demoProducts`
- Each product card: colored placeholder div with type-specific icon, title, type badge (color-coded), price with optional strikethrough comparePrice, sales count, revenue, published `Toggle`
- Empty state when no results match search/filter

### 3. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\DigitalProducts.tsx`
- Page title "Digital Products" with product count subtitle
- "Create Digital Product" button
- Filtered view of `demoProducts` where `type === 'digital'`
- Each product in a horizontal Card layout with: icon placeholder, title, description excerpt (line-clamp-2), published Badge, price with comparePrice strikethrough and discount percentage badge, included files list with file icons, stats row (sales, revenue, download count)
- `EmptyState` component shown if no digital products exist

### 4. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Courses.tsx`
- Page title "Courses" with subtitle
- Course header with image overlay, title, description, published badge
- Course settings row: price, student count (from `courseProduct.salesCount`), revenue, total lessons, total duration, CTA text
- Module list with expand/collapse per module using `ChevronDown`/`ChevronRight`
- Each module is a `Card` with title, lesson count, duration, "Add Lesson" button
- Each lesson shows: number, type icon (video/text/download), title, colored type badge, duration (if video)
- "Add Module" button at the top of the module list
- Uses `demoCourse` data and finds matching product for stats

### 5. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\MyStore.tsx`
- Page title "My Store" with "Open Store" button (ExternalLink icon)
- Left side: Phone-frame preview (rounded corners, notch, shadow) showing: avatar with colored border, name, bio, social links row (Instagram/YouTube/Twitter/LinkedIn/TikTok icons), product listing with price buttons styled in the selected primary color, "Powered by Stan" footer
- Right side customization panel:
  - **Template selector**: 4 options (Minimal, Classic, Magazine, Bold) as clickable cards with mini-preview, name, description, active checkmark
  - **Color picker**: 8 preset swatches (Purple, Blue, Pink, Red, Orange, Green, Teal, Indigo) with ring selection indicator
  - **Font selector**: Inter, Plus Jakarta Sans, DM Sans, Playfair Display - each shown in its own font with "Aa" preview
- "Save Changes" button at the bottom
- Preview updates live when changing color or font
